title: E-commerce API with Authentication and CRUD Operations
description: Build a RESTful API using Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL to manage products, orders, and users. Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms.
objectives: Learn to use TypeORM for database interactions in TypeScript
Implement password hashing and salting using bcrypt
Develop CRUD operations for products, orders, and users

milestones.title: Setup
milestones.description: Initialize project, install dependencies, and set up database schema
tasks: Create new Node.js project with TypeScript

milestones.title: Development
milestones.description: Implement authentication, authorization, and CRUD operations for products, orders, and users
tasks: Create product and order entities with CRUD operations

milestones.title: Testing
milestones.description: Write unit tests and integration tests for API endpoints
tasks: Use Jest and Supertest for testing

resources.title: Building a RESTful API with Node.js and TypeScript
